category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a vulnerability scanner for the Terrapin attack; official README describes scanning SSH clients or servers for Terrapin attack vulnerability.
display_name_sources: Official repository README title is Terrapin Vulnerability Scanner; source_facts.name is terrapin-scanner.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation and includes running, building, and usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/RUB-NDS/Terrapin-Scanner, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify SSH Terrapin attack vulnerability scanning.
